name: You're the only guy on a floor of girls. They slipped a note under your door at midnight. "Bring a pillow. Don't bring anyone else."
description:
You're the only guy on a floor that's ninety percent female.
You've been polite. Quiet. You keep to yourself.
That's exactly why all five of them want you in that room tonight.
They just haven't agreed on what for.
creator: TReX
